name: Using a non-default reference repo
prompt: Migrate this repo to GHA using LegalShield/products-intake-service as the reference instead of the default
expected_behavior: Detects target repo via `gh repo view --json nameWithOwner`
Uses the provided reference repo instead of the LegalShield/products-answers-service default
Fetches workflows from the specified reference repo
Pulls environment config from the reference repo
Adapts all repo-specific references (health URLs, source dirs, PR links, copilot prompts)
edge_cases: Reference repo may have different environment names or reviewer teams
Reference repo may not have AI summary steps
